_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: NF1-deficient glioma xenograft, LN229, also was transduced at approximately 30% by one dose of AAV-K55-GFP
details: NF1-deficient glioma xenograft LN229 was transduced at approximately 30% by one dose of AAV-K55-GFP
